comment: Cross-platform golden vectors for the uid_dec_reversed contract: decimal of the reversed raw UID byte array. Values computed with an independent oracle (.NET System.Numerics.BigInteger). The FB5D8229 vector is the contract anchor fixed in the product specification. Loaded by the Kotlin suite (JVM), the Swift suite (XCTest) and the Node verification harness — green on all lanes proves byte-identical output across platforms.

valid.note: 10-byte triple-size UID (exceeds UInt64 — forces big-int path)
